questionHtml:
A gas undergoes one cycle of a cyclic process.

The net change in internal energy of the gas is


A.  zero.

B.  positive.

C.  negative.

D.  determined by the initial temperature of the gas.

meta.title: A gas undergoes one cycle of a cyclic process. The net change in internal energy of the gas is A. zero. B. positive. C. negative. D. determined by the initial temperature of the ga
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
